source.license_note: No root license file was found; the checkout remains external and read-only.

baseline.official_sampling: 32 uniform frames up to the question timestamp
baseline.blocker: Pinned llava_qwen.py imports missing llava/model/llava_arch_baseline.py; no baseline result may be claimed from this checkout.

reporting.quality: Exact-match multiple-choice accuracy from the official evaluator
reporting.latency: Process wall time and peak GPU memory only
reporting.tail_latency: Unavailable because the pinned official evaluator has no per-sample timing
reporting.timestamp_normalization: Only sample_40_3 is normalized from 08:01 to 00:08:01 and recorded in the dataset manifest
reporting.formal_contract: 50 videos, 250 questions, five per video; exact-ID subsets are smoke-only
